a.xlink:title: Continuous attractor neural field — the core DFT building block.
Abstract base class for all simulation elements.
Bundles identity and spatial dimensions passed to every Element constructor.
Identity information for an element: numeric ID, name, and type label.
Spatial discretization of a one-dimensional field.
Parameters that govern a NeuralField's dynamics.
Abstract base for all element-specific parameter structs.
Abstract base for activation functions applied to a neural field.
Snapshot of a neural field's observable state.
Describes a single activation bump (peak) in a neural field.
